name: dynamic_widgets
description: Comprehensive tool to create, launch, read, update, list, and delete Dynamic Widgets (independent frameless neural micro-applications).

widget_id.description: Unique identifier for the widget (letters, numbers, hyphens only). Required for create, launch, delete, read_code, and update_code.

width.description: Width of the widget in pixels (used only if action=create).

height.description: Height of the widget in pixels (used only if action=create).

html_content.description: Complete HTML+CSS+JS code for the widget (used only if action=create or action=update_code).

always_on_top.description: Whether the widget should float above all other windows (used only if action=create).

description.description: A brief, human-readable summary of what the widget does, shown in the Manager UI (used only if action=create).
